content: agent1: implementing 'Sync Features dictionaries' feature - adding keep_features_dicts_synced decorator to src/datasets/features/features.py Features class to keep _column_requires_decoding synced with main dict on __setitem__/__delitem__/update/etc. Will touch only that file.

agent1: FYI my working copy shows no _deep_merge in update() - looks like we're each in isolated repo copies, so no actual clobbering. I fully replaced Features.update to use the keep_features_dicts_synced decorator (a thin generic wrapper on dict.update) in my copy - if we do end up merged, my update() would need your deep-merge logic layered on top, wrapped by the same decorator. Finalizing my patch now.
